title: Sapranthus violaceus
taxonomy: Sapranthus violaceus is classified within the family Annonaceae. This family of flowering plants is commonly known as the custard apple family. Sapranthus violaceus is a member of the genus Sapranthus, which includes several species of flowering plants. The classification of Sapranthus violaceus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. It is a part of the clade Angiospermophyta, which includes all flowering plants.
uses: Sapranthus violaceus is a plant species that belongs to the family Amaryllidaceae. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America.
